name: Macroeconomic & Market Conditions
summary: Statements in this Form 10-K regarding the potential future impact of macroeconomic conditions on the Company’s business and results of operations are forward-looking statements.

name: Competition
summary: The markets for the Company’s products and services are highly competitive, characterized by aggressive price competition and resulting downward pressure on gross margins.

name: Supply Chain & Manufacturing
summary: Certain components are currently obtained from single or limited sources, and many components are subject to industry-wide shortages and significant commodity pricing fluctuations.

name: Intellectual Property
summary: The Company holds a broad collection of intellectual property rights, and while it believes ownership is important, it relies on the innovative skills and technical competence of its personnel.

name: Talent & Labor
summary: The Company believes it has a talented, motivated, and dedicated team, and works to create an inclusive, safe, and supportive environment for all of its team members.

name: Foreign Operations & Geopolitical Risk
summary: Political events, trade and other international disputes, war, terrorism, natural disasters, public health issues, industrial accidents and other business interruptions can harm or disrupt international commerce and the global economy, and could have a material adverse effect on the Company and its customers, suppliers, contract manufacturers, logistics providers, distributors, cellular network carriers and other channel partners.

name: Product Quality & Liability
summary: While the Company’s suppliers are required to maintain safe working environments and operations, an industrial accident could occur and could result in serious injuries or loss of life, disruption to the Company’s business, and harm to the Company’s reputation.

name: Debt & Liquidity
summary: The Company is exposed to the risk of write-downs on the value of its inventory and other assets, in addition to purchase commitment cancellation risk.

name: Cybersecurity & Data Breaches
summary: Losses or unauthorized access to or releases of confidential information, including personal information, could subject the Company to significant reputational, financial, legal and operational consequences.

name: Regulatory & Legal Compliance
summary: The Company is subject to various claims, legal proceedings and government investigations that have arisen in the ordinary course of business and have not yet been fully resolved.

name: Litigation
summary: Epic Games, Inc. filed a lawsuit against the Company alleging violations of federal and state antitrust laws and California’s unfair competition law.

Macroeconomic & Market Conditions
summary: The Company’s operations and performance depend significantly on global and regional economic conditions and adverse economic conditions can materially adversely affect the Company’s business, results of operations and financial condition.

name: Competition
summary: The markets for the Company’s products and services are highly competitive, characterized by aggressive price competition and resulting downward pressure on gross margins.

name: Supply Chain & Manufacturing
summary: Although most components essential to the Company’s business are generally available from multiple sources, certain components are currently obtained from single or limited sources.

name: Intellectual Property
summary: The Company currently holds a broad collection of intellectual property rights relating to certain aspects of its hardware, accessories, software and services.

name: Foreign Operations & Geopolitical Risk
summary: Political events, trade disputes, and geopolitical tensions can materially adversely affect the Company and its customers, employees, and suppliers.

name: Talent & Labor
summary: The Company’s operations are subject to risks of industrial accidents at its suppliers and contract manufacturers, which could disrupt the Company’s business.

name: Product Quality & Liability
summary: The Company’s products and services may be affected from time to time by design and manufacturing defects that could materially adversely affect the Company’s business and result in harm to the Company’s reputation.

name: Debt & Liquidity
summary: The Company is exposed to the risk of write-downs on the value of its inventory and other assets, in addition to purchase commitment cancellation risk.

name: Regulatory & Legal Compliance
summary: The Company has implemented changes to comply with the Digital Markets Act (the “DMA”), including new business terms and alternative fee structures for iOS and iPadOS apps.

name: Cybersecurity & Data Breaches
summary: The Company’s business and reputation are impacted by information technology system failures and network disruptions.

name: Litigation
summary: The Company is currently subject to antitrust investigations and litigation in various jurisdictions around the world, which can result in legal proceedings and claims against the Company.

Macroeconomic & Market Conditions
summary: The Company’s operations and performance depend significantly on global and regional economic conditions and adverse economic conditions can materially adversely affect the Company’s business, results of operations, financial condition and stock price.

name: Competition
summary: The markets for the Company’s products and services are highly competitive and are characterized by aggressive price competition, downward pressure on gross margins, continual improvement in product performance, and price sensitivity on the part of consumers and businesses.

name: Supply Chain & Manufacturing
summary: Certain components are currently obtained from single or limited sources, and the Company may not be able to extend or renew agreements for the supply of components on similar terms, or at all.

name: Intellectual Property
summary: The Company currently holds a broad collection of intellectual property rights relating to certain aspects of its hardware, software and services.

name: Talent & Labor
summary: The Company’s ability to compete successfully depends on ensuring the continuing and timely introduction of innovative new products, services and technologies to the marketplace.

name: Product Quality & Liability
summary: While the Company maintains insurance coverage for certain types of losses, such insurance coverage may be insufficient to cover all losses that may arise.

name: Regulatory & Legal Compliance
summary: Regulatory requirements, government investigations and litigation can force the Company to withdraw from, or modify its products and services for, certain countries.

name: Debt & Liquidity
summary: The Company may not be able to extend or renew agreements for the supply of components on similar terms, or at all.

name: Cybersecurity & Data Breaches
summary: Losses or unauthorized access to or releases of confidential information, including personal information, could subject the Company to significant reputational, financial, legal and operational consequences.

name: U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia
Reputation & Brand
summary: Changes to the Company’s business practices to comply with new laws and regulations or in connection with legal proceedings can negatively impact the reputation of the Company’s products for privacy and security.

name: Litigation
summary: The Company is involved in various legal proceedings, including a civil antitrust lawsuit filed by the DOJ alleging monopolization in the smartphone market.

name: Foreign Operations & Geopolitical Risk
summary: The Company may use forwards, options or other instruments to protect gross margins from fluctuations in foreign exchange rates.

summary: Competitors to Office include software and global application vendors, web-based and mobile application companies, AI-first application companies, as well as local application developers.

name: Supply Chain & Manufacturing
summary: There are few qualified suppliers for certain components of our servers and devices.

name: Cybersecurity & Data Breaches
summary: Cyberattacks and security vulnerabilities could lead to reduced revenue, increased costs, liability claims, or harm to our reputation or competitive position.

name: Regulatory & Legal Compliance
summary: Our data-handling practices across our products and services will continue to be under scrutiny.

name: Talent & Labor
summary: Acquisitions and other transactions and arrangements involve significant challenges and risks, including that we have difficulty integrating and retaining new employees.

name: Debt & Liquidity
summary: We may not achieve significant revenue from new product, service, and distribution channel investments for several years, if at all.

name: Reputation & Brand
summary: Actual or perceived vulnerabilities may lead to claims against us, and improper disclosure or misuse of personal data could harm our reputation.

name: Product Quality & Liability
summary: Our software products and services may experience quality or reliability problems due to the imperfect processes we use to develop our software.

name: Litigation
summary: We have claims and lawsuits against us that may result in adverse outcomes, including significant monetary damages or injunctive relief.

name: Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development
Intellectual Property
summary: Protecting our intellectual property rights and combating unlicensed copying and use of our software, source code, and other intellectual property on a global basis is difficult.

name: Macroeconomic & Market Conditions
summary: Worsening economic conditions, including inflation, recession, pandemic, or other changes in economic conditions, may cause lower IT spending and adversely affect our results of operations.

name: Foreign Operations & Geopolitical Risk
summary: Abrupt political change, terrorist activity, and armed conflict, such as the ongoing conflict in Ukraine, pose economic and other risks, which may negatively impact our ability to sell to and collect from customers.

name: The Bank of New York Mellon Trust Company, N.A.
Macroeconomic & Market Conditions
summary: Factors that could cause or contribute to differences in actual results include those discussed in this Annual Report on Form 10-K.

name: Competition
summary: We face formidable competition in every aspect of our business, including from general purpose search engines, online advertising platforms, and AI model developers.

name: Debt & Liquidity
summary: Adverse macroeconomic conditions have affected, and may in the future affect, the demand for advertising, resulting in fluctuations in the amounts our advertisers spend on advertising.

name: Talent & Labor
summary: Our increasing investment in new businesses, products, services, and technologies is inherently risky, and could divert management attention and harm our business.

name: Regulatory & Legal Compliance
summary: Our business with financial services, healthcare, and public sector customers may present additional risks, including regulatory compliance risks.

name: Intellectual Property
summary: Our intellectual property rights are valuable, and any inability to protect them could reduce the value of our products, services, and brands.

name: Reputation & Brand
summary: Our strong brands have significantly contributed to the success of our business, and failing to maintain and enhance them would hurt our ability to expand.

name: Supply Chain & Manufacturing
summary: We face a number of manufacturing and supply chain risks that could affect our ability to supply our products and services.

name: Cybersecurity & Data Breaches
summary: Our systems are vulnerable to damage, interference, or interruption from various threats, which could harm our ability to provide products and services.

name: Litigation
summary: The US Department of Justice and various states have filed antitrust lawsuits concerning Google's advertising technologies and practices.

name: Macroeconomic & Market Conditions
summary: The aggregate market value of the voting stock held by non-affiliates of the registrant as of July 28, 2023 was approximately $1.1 trillion.

name: Competition
summary: The gaming industry is highly competitive, with many factors propelling its growth, including new high production value games and franchises.

name: Talent & Labor
summary: We work with several hundred partners in the automotive ecosystem including automakers, truck makers, tier-one suppliers, sensor manufacturers, automotive research institutions, HD mapping companies, and startups to develop and deploy AI systems for self-driving vehicles.

name: Regulatory & Legal Compliance
summary: Our unique end-to-end, software-defined approach is designed for continuous innovation and continuous development, enabling cars to receive over-the-air updates to add new features and capabilities throughout the life of a vehicle.

Supply Chain & Manufacturing
summary: Our supply chain is concentrated in the Asia-Pacific region, and new and existing export controls or changes to existing export controls could limit alternative manufacturing locations and negatively impact our business.

name: Reputation & Brand
summary: We believe that diverse teams fuel innovation, and we are committed to creating an inclusive culture that supports all employees.

name: Product Quality & Liability
summary: Defects in our products have caused and could cause us to incur significant expenses to remediate and could damage our business.

name: Cybersecurity & Data Breaches
summary: Product, system security and data breaches and cyber-attacks could disrupt our operations and adversely affect our financial condition, stock price and reputation.

name: Debt & Liquidity
summary: Our indebtedness could adversely affect our financial position and cash flows from operations and prevent us from implementing our strategy or fulfilling our contractual obligations.

summary: Adequately protecting our IP rights could be costly, and our ability to compete could be harmed if we are unsuccessful or if we are prohibited from making or selling our products.

name: Foreign Operations & Geopolitical Risk
summary: International sales expose us to risks from geopolitical tensions and regulatory changes that could adversely affect our operations.

name: Litigation
summary: We are defending a securities class action lawsuit from multiple shareholders asserting claims related to false and misleading statements about channel inventory and cryptocurrency mining.
